author: ZeroX4
name: AutoTile
description: Use set of 6 tiles to autotile tiles on tilemap object
Supports multiple sets and auto detects them

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Automatically change tiles according to thier adjacent tiles
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: AutoTile

eventsFunctions.description: Create tile from current tileset on selected tilemap.
eventsFunctions.name: CreateTIle
eventsFunctions.sentence: Create tile on _PARAM0_ at position X _PARAM2_ ;Y _PARAM3_ from tileset _PARAM4_ and connect it with other sets _PARAM5_

eventsFunctions.name: RemoveTile
eventsFunctions.sentence: Delete tile from _PARAM0_ at position X _PARAM2_ ;Y _PARAM3_

eventsFunctions.description: Remove all tiles from selected tilemap.
eventsFunctions.name: ZRemoveAll

eventsFunctions.description:
Update all tiles of selected tilemap
(BIGGER TILEMAP + MORE TILES = MORE LAG).
eventsFunctions.name: ZUpdateAll

eventsFunctions.description: Snaps object to selected tilemap grid.
eventsFunctions.name: ZZZSnapObject
eventsFunctions.sentence: Snap _PARAM2_ to _PARAM0_  grid on X _PARAM3_ and Y _PARAM4_ with X _PARAM5_ and Y _PARAM6_ offset

parameters: (mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX - Size, TileY - Size) / 4), Math.Columns / 4)) * 4 + ((Math.Columns * 6) * mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX - Size, TileY - Size) / (Math.Columns * 6)), Math.Rows / 6))

(mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX - Size, TileY) / 4), Math.Columns / 4)) * 4 + ((Math.Columns * 6) * mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX - Size, TileY) / (Math.Columns * 6)), Math.Rows / 6))

(mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX - Size, TileY + Size) / 4), Math.Columns / 4)) * 4 + ((Math.Columns * 6) * mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX - Size, TileY + Size) / (Math.Columns * 6)), Math.Rows / 6))

(mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX, TileY - Size) / 4), Math.Columns / 4)) * 4 + ((Math.Columns * 6) * mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX, TileY - Size) / (Math.Columns * 6)), Math.Rows / 6))

(mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX, TileY + Size) / 4), Math.Columns / 4)) * 4 + ((Math.Columns * 6) * mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX, TileY + Size) / (Math.Columns * 6)), Math.Rows / 6))

(mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX + Size, TileY - Size) / 4), Math.Columns / 4)) * 4 + ((Math.Columns * 6) * mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX + Size, TileY - Size) / (Math.Columns * 6)), Math.Rows / 6))

(mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX + Size, TileY) / 4), Math.Columns / 4)) * 4 + ((Math.Columns * 6) * mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX + Size, TileY) / (Math.Columns * 6)), Math.Rows / 6))

(mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX + Size, TileY + Size) / 4), Math.Columns / 4)) * 4 + ((Math.Columns * 6) * mod(trunc(Object.TileIdAtPosition(TileX + Size, TileY + Size) / (Math.Columns * 6)), Math.Rows / 6))

eventsFunctions.fullName: Tielest ID of tile at current position
eventsFunctions.name: TilesetID

eventsFunctions.description: OLD Loads data from JSON file and fill tilemap object with tiles from that file.
eventsFunctions.fullName: Load level data from JSON file
eventsFunctions.name: OLDTileDataFromJSON
eventsFunctions.sentence: OLD Load data from Assets/_PARAM2_/ _PARAM3_.json then  fill _PARAM0_ with tiles.

inlineCode: if (!file) throw new Error("FileName parameter is empty.");
if (!response.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + response.status + " " + response.statusText);

eventsFunctions.description: Save all tiles of selected tilemap into JSON file on your desktop.
eventsFunctions.fullName: Save tile data to JSON file
eventsFunctions.name: ZZZSaveTileDataToJSON
eventsFunctions.sentence: Save all tile data on desktop in JSON file named by sceene name + _PARAM0_  + _PARAM2_ .json

eventsFunctions.description: Load tile data from JSON fille and place tiles on selected tilemap according to that data.
eventsFunctions.fullName: Load tile data from JSON file
eventsFunctions.name: ZZZLoadFromVar
eventsFunctions.sentence: Load all tile data from _PARAM2_and fill _PARAM0_ with tiles

eventsFunctions.description: Load all tile data from storage and place tiles on selected tilemap according to that data.
eventsFunctions.name: ZZLoadFromStorage
eventsFunctions.sentence: Load all tile data from group _PARAM2_, in storage _PARAM3_ and fill _PARAM0_ with tiles

eventsFunctions.description: Save all tiles of selected tilemap into storage.
eventsFunctions.name: ZZSaveToStorage
eventsFunctions.sentence: Save all tile data to group _PARAM2_, in storage _PARAM3_ for _PARAM0_

propertyDescriptors.label: Tile size
propertyDescriptors.description: Put here same number as you put in tile size in tilemap object.
propertyDescriptors.name: TileSize

propertyDescriptors.label: Enable AutoTile
propertyDescriptors.description: If you want tiles from this tilemap object to autotile check this box. If you don't want them to autotile then un check it (So it act as normal tilemap object but you still can paint them in game then save/load).
propertyDescriptors.name: ZAutoTile
